description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode was slowing to a stop behind an already-stopped motorcycle waiting for a red 
signal in the right lane of westbound Division Street at Bryant Street in San Francisco, when a passenger vehicle (Vehicle 2) rapidly 
approached from the rear, overtook the slowing Zoox vehicle on the left, and swiped the left front sensor unit on the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox
 vehicle operator then disengaged from autonomy. Vehicle 2 driver then accelerated and struck the left side of the stopped motorcycle as 
they proceeded through the intersection, violating the red signal. The police arrived at the scene shortly after Vehicle 2 had left the scene. 
The Zoox vehicle was found to have sustained minor damage, and there were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
